user.title: Milesight WT101
user.description: Configure a WT101 thermostat. Pick the sensors that hold the uplink data, choose your LoRaWAN platform, and set the temperature limits.

ttn_creds.title: TTN credentials
ttn_creds.description: The Things Stack v3 server URL, application ID, and API key. The integration will then list devices in this application.

ttn_device.title: Pick a TTN device
ttn_device.description: WT101 devices (matched on Milesight brand and WT101 model in version_ids) are listed first. Pick the thermostat you want to control or choose Manual entry.

ttn_manual.title: TTN device id
ttn_manual.description: Type the device ID exactly as it appears in TTN.

chirpstack_creds.title: ChirpStack credentials
chirpstack_creds.description: ChirpStack v4 server URL and API token. The integration will then list applications and devices.

chirpstack_app.title: Pick a ChirpStack application
chirpstack_app.description: Choose the application that contains your WT101 thermostat, or pick Manual entry to type the device EUI directly.

chirpstack_device.title: Pick a ChirpStack device
chirpstack_device.description: Devices whose Device Profile name contains "WT101" are listed first.

chirpstack_manual.title: ChirpStack device EUI
chirpstack_manual.description: Type the device EUI in hex (16 characters).

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the server. Check the URL, credentials, and network.
